positive: Central, highly detailed circular mandala composition featuring an interconnected tapestry of stylized cosmic elements: bioluminescent fauna (e.g., stylized hummingbirds, mandrake roots), celestial bodies (crescent moons, nebulas), and geometric patterns. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau curves and cosmic psychedelia, rendered in a high-contrast, linocut aesthetic with metallic gold accents against deep sapphire and emerald backgrounds. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and symmetry, giving it the perfect balance for screen printing on apparel. Intricate, detailed line work, flat graphic quality, centralized and balanced composition, cinematic lighting, ultra-vivid colors, high saturation, decorative symmetry.
